phoneticUs: ňą…Ēňźrőło äňĆkle…™s; ňą…Ēňźrőło äňĆkle…™z; ňą…Ēňźrőł…ôňĆkle…™s; ňą…Ēňźrőł…ôňĆkle…™z
examples: Feldspar can be divided into two large group, the potassium feldspar includes orthoclase and microcline.
Perthite is orthoclase or microcline and albite over the product, which is more than orthoclase or microcline albite.
The moonstone has several kinds of color, they all belong to orthoclase. It is shown by study that the moonlight effect is determined by its own inner structure.
